pageSummary: Connect PalmPay with your merchant credentials and RSA keys. Capisum sends its webhook URL as notifyUrl on every payout — you do not configure a callback in PalmPay.
credentialsDescription: Enter your PalmPay account details, RSA private key, and platform public key.
ipAllowlistDescription: Add every Capisum static IP in PalmPay before connecting.
reviewConfirmation: I've whitelisted these Capisum IPs in PalmPay
rsaSetupTitle: Generate an RSA key pair locally
rsaSetupDescription: Generate keys locally, upload the public key to PalmPay as base64, and paste the private key into Capisum as base64.
rsaCopyPublicCommand: openssl rsa -pubin -in public.pem -outform DER | base64 | pbcopy
rsaCopyPrivateCommand: openssl pkcs8 -topk8 -inform PEM -outform DER -nocrypt -in private.pem | base64 | pbcopy
rsaPublicKeyHint: Paste into PalmPay as base64 only — do not include PEM headers.
rsaPrivateKeyHint: Paste into Capisum as base64 only — do not include PEM headers.
platformPublicKeyNote: Copy this from the PalmPay merchant portal → Open API / developer settings (shown near your App ID). It verifies webhooks — not the public.pem you uploaded to PalmPay.
